programs.title: Friends
programs.sub_title: The One In Barbados - Part Two
programs.desc: Part two of two. On the first hot day since their arrival in Barbados, the pals attend Ross's lecture, which is well received by his colleagues. Ross and Joey experience a change of fortunes, while Monica and Mike take part in a marathon ping-pong match, leaving Chandler irritated and Phoebe smitten.

programs.title: Friends
programs.sub_title: The One After Joey And Rachel Kiss
programs.desc: In Barbados, Monica, Chandler and Phoebe eavesdrop on their friends' passionate encounters; Monica styles her hair to look like a blowfish; Phoebe and Mike rekindle their romance.

programs.title: Becker
programs.desc: Chock Full 'o Nuts: A large number of street people flock about the diner and John's office. Jake's grandmother leaves him $25,000.

programs.title: Good Chef Bad Chef
programs.desc: Good Chef Bad Chef presents viewers with a range of both healthy and indulgent recipes and meal ideas and lets them decide what is right for them.

programs.title: Frasier
programs.desc: Frasier runs into Martin's old partner, Artie. He convinces Martin, who hasn't spoken with Artie in years, to mend their differences. Also, Maris has a facelift.

programs.title: Frasier
programs.desc: Frasier and Niles encounter bullies from their school days, but both approach the awkward reunion very differently.
